P

Ernesto Rios

Person · First seen 3307-11-30 · 14 mentions
Active: 3307-11-30 → 3312-02-03
Biography

Ernesto Rios is a field correspondent for Vox Galactica who has reported from some of the most dangerous frontlines of the Thargoid conflicts. In August 3308, he published a widely circulated dispatch from the aftermath of the HIP 22460 massacre, describing the information blackout imposed by authorities and the refusal of medical personnel to grant press access to survivors aboard Azimuth Biotech's surviving megaships.

Rios's reporting has consistently highlighted the gap between official narratives and ground-level reality during the Thargoid war. His dispatches from HIP 22460 captured both the scale of human suffering and the deliberate obfuscation by military and corporate authorities, establishing him as one of the most courageous war correspondents covering the Second Thargoid War.

Mentions Timeline (14 articles)
3312-02-03
Coalition Announces Non-Aggression Pact Amid HIP 87621 Hostilities
Coalition of major powers announces non-aggression pact in HIP 87621 enclave. Aisling, Grom, Arissa, Kaine, Mahon and Patreus aligned. Antal excluded. Analysts suggest motive is to refocus on core system conflicts.
3311-12-11
Battle Rages On Across HIP 87621 Enclave
After two weeks of enclave fighting, Vista Genomics confirms Radicoida unica is wholly unique. Aisling Duval leads with 6 systems, Jerome Archer is eliminated, and leaked communications indicate the war will continue until one Power dominates.
3309-10-23
Titan Survivors Kept in Quarantine
Thousands of rescued Titan captives remain in strict quarantine across all superpowers, with Tesreau reporting positive medical outcomes but governments maintaining caution.
3309-09-01
Aegis Leak Confirms Vanishing Populations
Aegis leadership recordings about Thargoid abductions are leaked by Seo Jin-ae, confirming millions are missing and captives are stored in pods aboard Titans.
3309-08-10
Aegis Investigates Missing Populations
Aegis analysis reveals tens of millions of people are unaccounted for in Thargoid-occupied systems, suggesting a mass abduction programme.
3309-05-12
Ground Troops Encounter Thargoid Drones
Thargoid 'Revenant' drones are attacking ground personnel in occupied settlements, adding a planetary surface dimension to the war.
3309-03-06
Marlinists Facing ‘Increasingly Grave’ Future
The Marlinist Colonies struggle with corporate exploitation and Thargoid vulnerability, with Parliament signaling willingness to contribute to Aegis but lacking military capacity.
3308-11-30
Havoc as Thargoids Overrun Multiple Systems
Nine systems have called for help against massive Thargoid attacks intent on wiping out civilian populations.
3308-11-25
Xeno-Peace Supporters Killed by Thargoids
Investigations in the Hyades Sector YO-Q b5-1 system have confirmed that Thargoid vessels attacked and destroyed the Kingfisher megaship.
3308-09-30
Militaries Prepare for Further Thargoid Strikes
Vox Galactica's Ernesto Rios summarises the post-HIP 22460 military situation, detailing divergent superpower responses to the Thargoid withdrawal and the growing xeno-peace movement led by Joy Senne.
3308-09-12
Thargoids Turn Attention to Inhabited Systems
Thargoid vessels invade the inhabited systems 42 n Persei, Chun Pindit and Tekkeitjal in a coordinated attack, the first such incursion since the Proteus Wave incident, threatening over seven million people.
3308-08-11
The Silent Aftermath
Two days after the HIP 22460 massacre, authorities maintain silence while Azimuth's surviving megaships accept survivors and medical personnel refuse press access to witnesses.
3307-12-21
Thargoid Presence Persists in Multiple Systems
Thargoid vessels continue to appear in over two dozen populated systems near nebulas, with organised pilot task forces achieving mixed success against the invaders.
3307-11-30
Thargoid Invasion of Nebula Systems Intensifies
Thargoid attacks intensify across the California, Coalsack, Pleiades, and Witch Head Nebulas, with anti-xeno squadrons struggling to repel unusually difficult waves of reinforcements.
